feedback.title: Feedback definitions
feedback.description: Define custom feedback metrics for evaluation

empty.title: No feedback definitions yet
empty.description: Create a feedback definition to start evaluating your agent.

deleteSingle.title: Delete feedback definition
deleteSingle.description: This action can't be undone. Existing scored traces won't be affected. Are you sure you want to continue?

deleteBatch.title: Delete feedback definitions
deleteBatch.description: This action can't be undone. Existing scored traces won't be affected. Are you sure you want to continue?

providers.title: AI Providers
providers.noProvidersDescription: Configure AI providers to use the playground and online scoring.

delete.title: Delete configuration
delete.description: This configuration is shared across the workspace. Deleting it will remove access for everyone. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?

environments.title: Environments
environments.noEnvironmentsDescription: Create an environment to organize traces by deployment stage (development, staging, production, …).
environments.atLimitTooltip: A workspace can have up to {{limit}} environments. Delete an existing one to create a new environment.

deleteSingle.title: Delete environment
deleteSingle.description: This action can't be undone. Existing traces and spans will keep their environment value. Are you sure you want to continue?

deleteBatch.title: Delete environments
deleteBatch.description: This action can't be undone. Existing traces and spans will keep their environment values. Are you sure you want to continue?

threadTimeout.name: Thread online scoring rule cooldown period
threadTimeout.dialogTitle: Edit thread online scoring rule cooldown period
threadTimeout.dialogDescription: Set how long to wait after the last activity in a thread before running thread-level online scoring rules. This gives conversations time to settle before automatic evaluation.
threadTimeout.validationError: Please select a valid timeout duration (maximum 7 days)
threadTimeout.toastDescription: Thread online scoring rules will wait {{duration}} after the last activity before evaluating threads.

validation.maxDuration: Please select a valid timeout duration (maximum 7 days)

truncationToggle.name: Data truncation in tables
truncationToggle.enableDescription: Truncating large data improves performance and enables full pagination options. You can change this anytime.
truncationToggle.disableDescription: Disabling truncation will display full content in tables. This may slow performance and limit pagination to {{limit}} items per page.
truncationToggle.performanceImpactDescription: Large amounts of data may cause slower page loading and increased memory usage.
truncationToggle.toastDisabledDescription: Pagination has been limited to prevent performance issues with large data.
truncationToggle.toastEnabledDescription: Full pagination options are now available.

environmentDialog.nameHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
environmentDialog.nameMaxLengthError: Name must be {{max}} characters or less
environmentDialog.namePatternError: Name must start with a letter and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
environmentDialog.colorLockedTooltip: Color is locked for default environments
